title: Caffeine
summary: chemical compound used as a stimulant

content_blocks.body_md:
Caffeine is the world's most widely used psychoactive drug, and the only one
routinely served to children (as chocolate) and at the breakfast table.

why_it_matters.text: The molecule behind coffee's lift: it keeps you feeling alert by getting in the way of your brain's own sleepiness signal.
